bigquery_options.description: Specifies options that affect sink exporting to BigQuery, such as partitioning and use of storage write API.

description.description: Defines the purpose or details of the organization-level logging sink; optional but recommended for clarity.

destination.description: Specifies the destination for log entries, such as a Cloud Storage bucket, BigQuery dataset, or Pub/Sub topic. Must be a valid resource in the required format.

disabled.description: Specifies whether the logging sink is disabled; set to true to disable the sink and prevent it from exporting logs.

exclusions.description: Defines log exclusions for the organization sink, specifying which log entries should be excluded from being exported.

filter.description: Defines the advanced logs filter to determine which log entries to include in the sink; must be a valid filter expression.

include_children.description: Determines whether to include logs from child resources, such as projects or folders, in the sink. Must be a boolean value.

intercept_children.description: Determines whether log entries from child projects are included in the sink; must be true or false.

name.description: The unique name for the logging sink, must be compliant with Google Cloud naming conventions.

org_id.description: Identifier of the organization for which the logging sink is created; must be a valid organization ID.
